profile.foriaRememberDesc: When this is on, Foria can use your past Random Chat conversations (just with you) to keep the conversation flowing. You can turn this off any time.

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.plans.free.title: Free
upgrade.plans.free.desc: Start messaging for free. Ideal if you’re just trying Chatforia.
upgrade.plans.free.features.ai: AI-powered smart replies and instant translation (fair use)
upgrade.plans.plus.title: Plus
upgrade.plans.plus.desc: All the essentials, without ads. Great for everyday messaging and calling.
upgrade.plans.premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)
upgrade.plans.premiumMonthly.desc: The full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, and priority support.
upgrade.plans.premiumMonthly.features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools for rewrites, smart replies, and summaries
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.desc: Save more when billed yearly — including extra color themes, AI tools, and priority support.
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.features.bes: Best for power users, remote workers, and heavy travelers
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Save 30% with annual – continue to login
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Billed upfront. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees.
upgrade.mobile.unlimited.features.thrott: High-speed data subject to fair-use and network management policies
upgrade.mobile.unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.
upgrade.mobile.packs.unlimited.title: {{scope}} Unlimited
upgrade.mobile.compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
upgrade.mobile.compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, and other apps on your phone).
upgrade.mobile.small.title: Small pack
upgrade.mobile.small.bestFor: Best for short trips and light messaging.
upgrade.mobile.medium.title: Medium pack
upgrade.mobile.medium.bestFor: Best for everyday messaging, maps, and light media.
upgrade.mobile.large.title: Large pack
upgrade.mobile.large.bestFor: Best for longer trips and heavier app use.
upgrade.mobile.xl.title: XL pack
upgrade.mobile.xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.
upgrade.family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
upgrade.family.subtitle: Share a single data pool across your family. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.
upgrade.family.small.title: Family Small
upgrade.family.small.desc: Includes 20 GB of shared high-speed data — great for 2–3 light users.
upgrade.family.medium.title: Family Medium
upgrade.family.medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of shared high-speed data — ideal for 3–5 active members.
upgrade.family.large.title: Family Large
upgrade.family.large.desc: Includes 80 GB of shared high-speed data — for power families that are always online.
upgrade.family.feature.shared: Shared data pool for your family
upgrade.family.disclaimer: Family packs create or top up a shared data pool. You can invite and remove members anytime.
upgrade.family.footnote: Family packs share a single data pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability and limits depend on your country and local regulations.
upgrade.why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
upgrade.why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.
upgrade.why.card.textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
upgrade.why.card.voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
upgrade.why.card.messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
upgrade.why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.
upgrade.faq.title: Pricing & plans FAQ
upgrade.faq.free.q: Is the Free plan really free?
upgrade.faq.free.a: Yes. The Free plan includes a Chatforia number, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay on Free as long as you like, or upgrade to remove ads and unlock more features.
upgrade.faq.plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium?
upgrade.faq.plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your message history — perfect for everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority support for heavy users.
upgrade.faq.esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work?
upgrade.faq.esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your country and device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app.
upgrade.faq.cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
upgrade.faq.cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.
upgrade.faq.family.a: Family packs create a shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can invite or remove members and set limits per person.

safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.
safety.tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction
safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.
blog.whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
blog.whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships and collaborate internationally.
blog.index.title: Chatforia Blog
blog.chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
blog.chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.
blog.chatSafely.personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
blog.chatSafely.personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.
blog.chatSafely.safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
blog.chatSafely.safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.
blog.chatSafely.scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
blog.chatSafely.scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.
blog.chatSafely.responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
blog.chatSafely.responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.
blog.chatSafely.whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
blog.chatSafely.whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.
advertise.why.deals: Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.rights.title: Your rights
privacyPolicy.rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.
privacyPolicy.changes.title: Changes
privacyPolicy.changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.
privacyPolicy.contact.title: Contact
privacyPolicy.contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
terms.yourContent.title: Your content
terms.yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).
terms.changes.title: Changes
terms.changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.
terms.contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
refund.eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
refund.eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted for duplicate charges, billing errors, or technical issues preventing access to paid features. All requests are reviewed case-by-case.
refund.nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable
refund.nonRefundable.body: We generally do not provide refunds for unused time, partial subscription periods, or failure to cancel before renewal.
refund.contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
